evidence_quotes.quote: Abusive practices (forced closures of servers, removal of purchased content, unjustified restrictions on access) threaten not only the freedom of players, but also the preservation of European video cultural heritage.
The right to access to lawfully acquired games, even after their commercial withdrawal.

paragraphs.text: As a citizen and passionate of video games, I would like to ask you to explicitly include the Stop Killing Video Games initiative as part of the EU Digital Fairness Act. Abusive practices (forced closures of servers, removal of purchased content, unjustified restrictions on access) threaten not only the freedom of players, but also the preservation of European video cultural heritage. I encourage you to ensure that: The right to access to lawfully acquired games, even after their commercial withdrawal. Transparency of service conditions and updates. Protecting consumers against practices that erase or render inaccessible their purchases. The integration of this cause will enhance the credibility and clarity of the Digital Fairness Act, while protecting millions of European citizens.
